params._oracle: The address of the preimage oracle contract.

returns.stateVersion_: The state version implemented by this contract.

params._localContext: The local key context for the preimage oracle. Optional, can be set as a constant                      if the caller only requires one set of local keys.
params._proof: The encoded proof data: <<thread_context, inner_root>, <memory proof>.               Contains the thread context witness and the memory proof data for leaves within the MIPS VM's memory.               The thread context witness is a packed tuple of the thread context and the immediate inner root of the current thread stack.

returns.postState_: The hash of the post state witness after the state transition.

oracle().notice: Getter for the pre-image oracle contract.

step(bytes,bytes,bytes32).notice: Executes a single step of the multi-threaded vm.         Will revert if any required input state is missing.

version().notice: The semantic version of the MIPS64 contract.

oracle().notice: Getter for the pre-image oracle contract.

step(bytes,bytes,bytes32).notice: Executes a single step of the multi-threaded vm.         Will revert if any required input state is missing.

version().notice: The semantic version of the MIPS64 contract.

InvalidExitedValue().notice: Thrown when the value of the exited boolean is not 0 or 1.

InvalidMemoryProof().notice: Thrown when reading an invalid memory

InvalidRMWInstruction().notice: Thrown when an RMW instruction is expected, but a different instruction is provided.

InvalidSecondMemoryProof().notice: Thrown when the second memory location is invalid

UnsupportedStateVersion().notice: Thrown when the state version set is not supported.

userdoc.notice: The MIPS64 contract emulates a single MIPS instruction.         It differs from MIPS.sol in that it supports MIPS64 instructions and multi-tasking.

params._oracle: The address of the preimage oracle contract.

returns.stateVersion_: The state version implemented by this contract.

params._localContext: The local key context for the preimage oracle. Optional, can be set as a constant                      if the caller only requires one set of local keys.
params._proof: The encoded proof data: <<thread_context, inner_root>, <memory proof>.               Contains the thread context witness and the memory proof data for leaves within the MIPS VM's memory.               The thread context witness is a packed tuple of the thread context and the immediate inner root of the current thread stack.

returns.postState_: The hash of the post state witness after the state transition.

documentation.text:
@notice Computes the hash of the MIPS state.
 @return out_ The hashed MIPS state.
@notice Updates the current thread stack root via inner thread root in calldata

@notice Preempts the current thread for another and updates the VM state.
         It reads the inner thread root from calldata to update the current thread stack root.
@notice Pushes a thread to the current thread stack.
@notice Removes the current thread from the stack.
@notice Returns true if the number of threads is 1
@notice Validates the thread witness in calldata against the current thread.
